items.title: Marine Le Pen found guilty, but court clears way for presidential run if she wears tag
items.summary: The National Rally leader now has to decide whether she will run with an electronic tag and will speak on TV later.

items.title: Zelensky presses Nato for air defence systems after intense Russian strikes
items.summary: The Ukrainian president says "decisions for air defence" should be "one of the key outcomes" of this week's summit in Turkey.

items.title: Woman suspected of Monaco bomb attack found dead in Ukraine
items.summary: Police had been hunting Anastasiia Berezovska after a Ukrainian millionaire was injured in the blast.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 不再是宿敵！70％韓國人支持仿照歐盟與日本建立經濟共同體
items.summary: 韓國時報7日報導，大韓商工會議所（KCCI）6日公佈調查顯示，近70%的韓國人支持與日本成立類似歐盟的經濟共同體，而60%的日本人對此表達贊同。  報導說，多次提出建立韓日...…

items.title: 南韓「假新聞法」上路》媒體、網紅傳播不實訊息 恐遭5倍懲罰性賠償
items.summary: 南韓7日開始實施一項新法，允許對散布虛假訊息的新聞媒體與社群媒體網紅，處以高額的懲罰性損害賠償。新聞記者團體警告，此舉恐將使公共輿論產生「寒蟬效應」，並引來政府審查。  ...…

items.title: 共軍試射潛射洲際飛彈 中國國防部否認核軍備競賽
items.summary: 中國6日向太平洋海域試射可搭載核彈頭的潛射洲際彈道飛彈，引發國際社會不滿。中國國防部今天堅稱是年度軍事訓練例行安排，「符合國際法和國際慣例」，並聲稱「不與任何國家進行核軍備競賽」。  共...…
